SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-30-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for small claims appeal.

Appearances: Nancy Conway, on behalf of Plaintiffs/Respondents: Brady Sollish, Fred Sollish, Janice Sollish and Anya Sollish
Mordko Korsunsky, Defendant/Appellant, present in Pro Per
Witness for Defendant/Appellant: Betty Dukhovny

All parties and witnesses were sworn. Exhibits were received from both plaintiff and defendant. Having heard oral arguments, the Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: N. Regas, Not reported (602)
